creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
… after renaming the file, as instructed: 

SHA256 (TrueCrypt_7.1a_Source.tar.gz) = 5eaa2f2d58e4c2ecdcdd4e61cc737f7b500fb353c8700635c1fa64824d8279a4

– which does not match the e6214e911d0bbededba274a2f8f8d7b3f6f6951e20f1c3a598fc7a23af81c8dc at <https://www.freshports.org/security/truecrypt/#distinfo>
